title: Bed in Nether
description: Vanilla+ Fabric 1.20.1 modpack with creatures, combat, immersion, performance, and cozy adventures.
body:
# Bed in Nether

**Bed in Nether** is a Fabric 1.20.1 modpack designed to **enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience as much as possible without overwhelming it**.
The goal is to keep the game feeling familiar and balanced, while enriching it with atmosphere, exploration, combat depth, and quality-of-life features.

---

## 🌍 World & Nature

* **[Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/F8BQNPWX)** – new animals and ecosystems.
* **[Critters and Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/Yd4wb5wZ)** – cute pets and companions.
* **[Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/POQ2i9zu)** – adds back unreleased or scrapped mobs.
* **[Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/8YcE8y4T)** – frog villagers in swamp villages.
* **[Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/GuE5FpvB)** – introduces **capybaras and other animals**, plus new trees such as **sakura, palm, amaranth**, and biomes tied to them.
* **[Beneath the Wetlands](https://modrinth.com/mod/QjzFB2iK)** – swamp biome expansions.
* **[Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jSV9w0J5)** – new structures and raid encounters.
* **[Nyf’s Spiders](https://modrinth.com/mod/dOGM7ccu)** – diverse spiders that can **crawl along sloped surfaces** just like the floor.
* **[Snowy Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/UiFDlI7w)** & **[Snow! Real Magic!](https://modrinth.com/mod/iJNje1E8)** – realistic and immersive snow mechanics.

---

## ⚔️ Combat & Adventure

* **[Medieval Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/C37HUu02)** – medieval-style weaponry.
* **[True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/MCnBYP0b)** – a more epic dragon fight.
* **[MmmMmmMmmMmm](https://modrinth.com/mod/Adega8YN)** – combat training dummies.

---

## 🎒 Inventory & Utility

* **[Bean’s Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kYt0MSgT)** – portable backpacks.
* **[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/fFEIiSDQ)** & **[Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/6iTJugQR)** – decorative and functional blocks.
* **[Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/joEfVgkn)** – pick up chests, blocks, and mobs.
* **[Right Click Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/Cnejf5xM)** – quick crop harvesting.
* **[Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/kfqD1JRw)** – crafting tables keep their inventory.

---

## 🌌 Atmosphere & Immersion

* **[Sleep Tight](https://modrinth.com/mod/tNai0h2Y)** – overhauled sleeping system, including Nether beds.
* **[Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/hB899VmG)** – photography camera.
* **[Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/TaSmHw8V)** – playable instruments.
* **[Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pZ2wrerK)** – emotes and custom animations.
* **[Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/2rL16t1O)** – blood moons and lunar events.
* **[Immersive Weathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/jkskOO9i)** – block aging and natural erosion.
* **[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/fM515JnW)**, **[Immersive Thunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/uKjKoMsj)**, **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/qyVF9oeo)** – immersive audio landscapes.
* **[Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/WhbRG4iK)**, **[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/rI0hvYcd)**, **[Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/T8MMXTpr)**, **[Windchimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/iM50gcBD)** – small immersive details.

---

## 🛠️ Performance & Enhancements

The pack includes **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Starlight**, **FerriteCore**, **ModernFix**, and other optimization mods for smooth performance.

---

## 📜 Licenses & Credits

All mods are hosted **exclusively on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/)** and properly credited to their authors.
Every mod in this pack is open-source or allowed in modpacks, with **no licensing disputes or violations**.
